question_bank.answer: Our internal knowledge-base search had ~60% retrieval accuracy because fixed-size chunking was splitting context mid-sentence, causing embeddings to be noisy. I mapped the failure modes, re-designed the pipeline with semantic paragraph boundaries and added a BM25 reranking stage. Retrieval accuracy improved to 85% and hallucination rate dropped by ~40%, directly reducing escalations from the support team.
